# Quote

<TierBadge tier="value" />

Get the latest NBBO quote snapshot for one or more stocks.

* Returns a real-time last BBO quote from the [Nasdaq Basic feed](https://docs.thetadata.us/Articles/Data-And-Requests/The-SIPs) if the account has a [stocks standard or pro subscription](https://www.thetadata.net/subscribe.html#stocks).
* Returns a 15-minute delayed NBBO quote from the [UTP & CTA feeds](https://docs.thetadata.us/Articles/Data-And-Requests/The-SIPs) account has the [stocks value subscription](https://www.thetadata.net/subscribe.html#stocks) subscription.
- Theta Data resets its snapshot cache at midnight ET every day. This endpoint may not work on a weekend where there were no eligible messages sent over exchange feeds. We recommend using historic requests during the weekend.

<SdkTabs>

<template #rust>

```rust
pub fn stock_snapshot_quote(&self, symbols: &[&str]) -> StockSnapshotQuoteBuilder<'_>
```

Optional parameters chain on the builder: `.venue(&str)`, `.min_time(&str)`. Execute with `.await` → `Result<Vec<QuoteTick>, Error>`, or decode chunk-by-chunk with `.stream(handler)`.

**Example**

```rust
let rows = tdx.stock_snapshot_quote(&["AAPL"]).await?;
for t in &rows {
    println!("date={} ms_of_day={} bid={} ask={}", t.date, t.ms_of_day, t.bid, t.ask);
}
```

</template>

<template #python>

```python
ThetaDataDxClient.stock_snapshot_quote(
    symbols,
    *,
    venue=None, min_time=None, timeout_ms=None,
) -> list[QuoteTick]
```

`stock_snapshot_quote_async(...)` awaits the same call shape.

**Example**

```python
rows = tdx.stock_snapshot_quote(["AAPL"])
for t in rows:
    print(t.date, t.ms_of_day, t.bid, t.ask)
```

</template>

<template #typescript>

```typescript
stockSnapshotQuote(
  symbols: Array<string>, venue?: string, minTime?: string | Date,
  timeoutMs?: number,
): Array<QuoteTick>
```

Optional parameters are positional; pass `undefined` to skip one.

**Example**

```typescript
const rows = tdx.stockSnapshotQuote(['AAPL']);
for (const t of rows) {
  console.log(t.date, t.msOfDay, t.bid, t.ask);
}
```

</template>

<template #cpp>

```cpp
std::vector<QuoteTick> stock_snapshot_quote(
    const std::vector<std::string>& symbols,
    const EndpointRequestOptions& options = {}) const;
```

Optional parameters chain on `EndpointRequestOptions`: `.with_venue(...)`, `.with_min_time(...)`. Throws `tdx::Error` on failure.

**Example**

```cpp
auto rows = client.stock_snapshot_quote({"AAPL"});
for (const auto& t : rows) {
    std::cout << t.date << ' ' << t.ms_of_day << ' ' << t.bid << ' ' << t.ask << "\n";
}
```

</template>

<template #http>

```http
GET http://127.0.0.1:25503/v3/stock/snapshot/quote
```

Served by the bundled [server binary](/server/); responses stream as JSON, CSV, or NDJSON via the `format` parameter.

**Example**

```bash
curl 'http://127.0.0.1:25503/v3/stock/snapshot/quote?symbol=AAPL'
```

</template>

</SdkTabs>

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `symbol` | symbols | yes | — | Comma-separated ticker symbols (e.g. AAPL,MSFT) |
| `venue` | string | no | `nqb` | Venue/exchange filter. Accepted values: `nqb`, `utp_cta`. |
| `min_time` | string | no | — | Minimum time filter |
| `timeout_ms` | int | no | — | Per-request deadline in milliseconds. 0 means no deadline. |

## Response

Rows of `QuoteTick`:

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `ms_of_day` | i32 | Milliseconds since midnight Eastern Time. |
| `bid_size` | i32 | Last NBBO bid size. |
| `bid_exchange` | i32 | Exchange code of the NBBO bid. |
| `bid` | f64 | Last NBBO bid price. |
| `bid_condition` | i32 | Quote condition code on the bid side. |
| `ask_size` | i32 | Last NBBO ask size. |
| `ask_exchange` | i32 | Exchange code of the NBBO ask. |
| `ask` | f64 | Last NBBO ask price. |
| `ask_condition` | i32 | Quote condition code on the ask side. |
| `date` | i32 | Trading date as a YYYYMMDD integer. |
